name: Stunt Paradise
short_description: Get ready for an adrenaline-fueled ride in Stunt Paradise! Take on epic challenges, perform insane stunts, and experience extreme driving. Buckle up and play now!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Stunt Paradise, the ultimate destination for extreme driving and heart-pumping stunts! Buckle up and prepare to experience the thrill of a lifetime as you take on the most epic challenges on four wheels.



Push your driving skills to the limit as you perform insane stunts, including jumping off ramps, flipping through the air, and smashing through explosive obstacles!

Explore extreme tracks in various locations, from industrial cities and dusty deserts to beautiful tropical beaches. With many cool cars to choose from, each level offers a unique challenge that enhances your driving experience.

Key features

  • Extreme driving stunts
  • 20 unique cars
  • 50 crazy levels
  • Stylish graphics

Hit the gas and start your adventure in the world of extreme driving and stunts!

supported_languages: English, Ukrainian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
